codeReview.summary: Validation-only feature review passed. Commit 4ff19d4 is an empty checkpoint commit, and handoff/transcript evidence shows lint, format:check, build, and the specified non-interactive CLI smoke commands completed successfully.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill procedure requires explicit execution of test:unit/test:integration:mock/test:integration:real, but this run used consolidated `bun test` and still reported followedProcedure=true. This creates ambiguity about acceptable validator command equivalence for validation-only features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl (session 6104969e-d9f2-418f-8bbc-177f912fbc2a) shows `bun test` execution and no explicit `bun run test:unit`, `bun run test:integration:mock`, or `bun run test:integration:real`; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true with no deviations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Direct `oxfmt` binary invocation failed in the worker shell and required `npx oxfmt`; this invocation nuance is not currently captured in shared environment/library notes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session 6104969e-d9f2-418f-8bbc-177f912fbc2a shows `oxfmt --check cli/src/generated/manifest.ts` returning exit 127, followed by successful `npx oxfmt --check cli/src/generated/manifest.ts` exit 0.

summary: Pass: feature intent (mission-close quality gates + smoke verification) is satisfied with no blocking defects. Noted two non-blocking shared-state observations around skill command-equivalence clarity and local oxfmt invocation behavior.
